schema_notes: Each question keeps the original top-level sparql_query field for backward compatibility.
sparql_interpretations[0] is always the original source query copied exactly.
sparql_queries is a convenience list derived from sparql_interpretations.
primary_category is the single best category for the main question focus; secondary_categories lists other applicable but non-primary categories.
Additional interpretations are ambiguity-oriented scaffolds and should be executed/validated against the target GeoOutageKG endpoint before being treated as final gold queries.
question_template and template_variables are intended to support template expansion and primary/secondary category-level reporting.

questions.question: Which customer outage records were recorded in the calendar year after 2021?
questions.sparql_query:
PREFIX goo:    <https://ucf-henat.github.io/GeoOutageOnto/#>
PREFIX gokg:   <http://example.org/resource#>
PREFIX xsd:    <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdf:    <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX rdfs:   <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT ?rec ?recordDate ?numOutages
WHERE {
  ?rec a goo:CustomerOutageRecord ;
       goo:recordDateTime ?recordDate ;
       goo:numberOfOutages ?numOutages .
  FILTER (?recordDate >= "2022-01-01T00:00:00Z"^^xsd:dateTime && ?recordDate < "2023-01-01T00:00:00Z"^^xsd:dateTime)
}
ORDER BY ?recordDate
LIMIT 10
questions.question_template: Which {OUTAGE_RECORD_TYPE} were recorded in the {TEMPORAL_WINDOW}?

temporal: Natural language contains a temporal phrase that requires a chosen interval or alignment rule.
SPARQL resolves the temporal phrase into explicit date/time bounds or date strings.

questions.question: For each second-level administrative division in the U.S., what is their average social vulnerability index?
questions.sparql_query:
PREFIX goo:    <https://ucf-henat.github.io/GeoOutageOnto/#>
PREFIX gokg:   <http://example.org/resource#>
PREFIX xsd:    <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdf:    <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX rdfs:   <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT ?adminDivision (AVG(?sviScore) AS ?averageSviOverallScore)
WHERE {
  ?adminDivision a goo:County .
  ?sviRecord a goo:SVIRecord ;
             goo:representsCounty ?adminDivision ;
             goo:sviOverallScore ?sviScore .
}
GROUP BY ?adminDivision
ORDER BY ?adminDivision
LIMIT 10
questions.question_template: For each {ADMIN_DIVISION_SCOPE}, what is their average {SVI_METRIC}?

ADMIN_DIVISION_SCOPE.value: second-level administrative division in the U.S.

temporal: The average is computed across all available SVIRecord years for each county.
semantic: Social vulnerability index is operationalized as goo:sviOverallScore and averaged with SPARQL AVG.
